title: ProofMeta Status Update Payload
description: Payload schema for PENDING / GRANTED / DENIED / REVOKED envelopes. The outer envelope MUST validate against envelope.schema.json, and its in_reply_to MUST point at the payload_hash of the previous envelope in the same lifecycle. See PROOFMETA_ANWEISUNG.md §3.4.

request_id.description: Must match the OPEN envelope's request_id.

note.description: Optional human-readable context for the state transition.

delivery.description: Typically attached to GRANTED envelopes. Opaque to the protocol.

method.description: Delivery method identifier matching a Manifest 'delivery' resolver id.
